entity.summary: Japan-based centralized crypto exchange candidate represented by CCXT and CoinGecko source rows. HEI treats bittrade / Huobi Japan / BitTrade rows as one entity for v0.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0335 and hei_unadded_0336 as one entity. This record should be improved later with stronger rebrand, licensing, or operating-history evidence.
